steps.title: Match the example
steps.content: The example explains that firms benefit when they locate near one another, because close proximity makes information sharing easier. The blank therefore needs a word meaning gather together in one region.

steps.title: Test the meanings
steps.content: Choice A means happen again, not cluster in a place. Choice B means scatter or fade away, the opposite of gathering. Choice D means end, which would not let firms enjoy regional benefits. The word that means gather in one area fits the example. The answer is C.
